ab: ayza a ladayen nu saydang kamu tabuyu’.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: sakamu sa ci ina yadah ku likes i buyu’.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: ayza a ladayen nu saydang kamu taumah.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: a mitabi kita haw?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: a tacuwa kita ayza.
en: Where are we going today?

ab: a ladayen nu saydang kami tayza i sauwac.
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: a tacuwa kita ayza?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: a ladayen nu saydang kami tayza/tayda i buyu’.
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: a tayza kita ayza i sauwac haw?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: caay, a ladayen nu saydang kami tayza/tayda i buyu’.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: a tayza kita ayza i buyu’ haw?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: caay, a tayza/tayda i umah kami ayza.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: saydang, tayza kita i sauwac u canan ku azihen?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: tayda kita miadih tu beded.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: saydang, tayda i buyu’ kita u canan ku adihen?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: tayda kita miadih tu adipapang.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: mihica kita tayda i umah?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: tayda kita i umah miadih tu nipalumaan a kubkub, pihaymawi tu puduh atu wadu!
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: saydang a tayda kita i sauwac midanguy haw?
ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: caay, a miadih/miazih kita tu beded.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: saydang a tayda kita i umah paluma tu lami’ haw?
ch: A:老師我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: ayda a tayda/tayza kita mitabi.
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: idaw i tida ku beded misabahebahel.
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: ayda henay kaku makadih tu maudipay a beded.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: i tida idaw ku sabahebahelay a adipapang.
ye! hubaw! manamuh kaku tu adipapang, salungan.
ch: B:耶!哇!我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮。
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: i tida idaw ku sabahebahelay a adipapang.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: caay kau adipapang kuyda, u wadu kuyda.
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: kaitini tu miazih, amana ka tayda/tayza i baatay a kakitidaan.
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: hang, caay ka tayda/tayza kami i mabaatay.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: amana ka duba’, pihaymawi muculil mapulina.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: maydih kaku kalamkam sa makaadih.
en: I want to see them right away.
